Class MongoField

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.mapping.MongoField
public class MongoField extends Object
Value Object for representing a field to read/write within a MongoDB Document.
Since:
4.2
Author:
Christoph Strobl

  • Method Details

    • fromKey

      public static MongoField fromKey(String name)
      Create a new MongoField with given name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name to be used as is (with all its potentially special characters).
      Returns:
      new instance of MongoField.

    • fromPath

      public static MongoField fromPath(String name)
      Create a new MongoField with given name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name to be used path expression.
      Returns:
      new instance of MongoField.

    • builder

      public static MongoField.MongoFieldBuilder builder()
      Returns:
      new instance of MongoField.MongoFieldBuilder.

    • getName

      public FieldName getName()
      Returns:
      never null.

    • getOrder

      public int getOrder()
      Get the position of the field within the target document.
      Returns:
      Integer.MAX_VALUE if undefined.

    • getFieldType

      public FieldType getFieldType()
      Get the fields target type if defined.
      Returns:
      never null.
